headline: Duos Technologies Group, Inc. (DUOT) Reports Q4 Loss, Misses Revenue Estimates
summary: Duos Technologies Group, Inc. (DUOT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -1,400.00% and -5.42%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: SLB and Azule Energy Scale Enterprise Digital Operations to Strengthen Energy Delivery in Angola
summary: HOUSTON, March 31, 2026--Global technology company SLB (NYSE: SLB) today announced a three-year agreement with Azule Energy to continue and expand the use of its enterprise digital platform across Azule’s operations in Angola. The platform will help Azule drive more consistent execution, accelerate decision-making, and support reliable energy delivery across its portfolio.

raw.headline: SLB and Azule Energy Scale Enterprise Digital Operations to Strengthen Energy Delivery in Angola
